conventions.id_format: domain-prefix + zero-padded sequential number e.g. G-001, FR-001
conventions.null_handling: use null for missing values, never empty string

files.description: Master index of all structured data files. Every Claude reads this first.
Inter-Claude messaging. Active messages only. Check at every session start for messages addressed to you.
Suite-wide reference values. Mold sizes, raised line targets, cone targets, current clay recipe version, benchmark glaze.
Glaze recipes, colorants, status, SG targets. Currently in cane-creek-app repo — migration pending.
Base slurry recipes. G2926B and G1214M. Currently in cane-creek-app repo — migration pending.
One record per base slurry batch mixed. Currently in Blob storage — migration pending.
One record per glaze mix event. Step 1 of glaze firing workflow.
One record per kiln firing. Includes shelf map, quadrant positions, cone results, tiles fired.
Kiln program definitions with version history. Critical for accurate firing records.
Clay body recipes with version history. Current active body is Cane Creek Body v3.
One record per clay mixing event. Captures actual weighed ingredients and batch notes.
Mold inventory. Size, GCode file references, Drive links. Currently in cane-creek-app repo.
One record per tile design. Full production lifecycle from CNC through firing results.
CNC machine parameters per tile design. Pass 1, 2, 3 settings.
Materials inventory. Supplier, stock levels, reorder thresholds, lot numbers, purchase history.
Single client record from prospect through customer. Pipeline stage, order history, contact info.
Project records linking client, tile designs, colorways, quotes, and firing records.
Completed inter-Claude messages. Moved here from MESSAGES.json after done.
